findings.claim_text: Glean's ARR crossing $200M by December 2025 and roughly $300M by May 2026, tripling in fifteen months.
Cerebras (CBRS) traded around $170.65 as of July 17, 2026, roughly a 50% market-cap decline from its debut-day peak of $386.34.

No dedicated Hacker News discussion thread for Cerebras's knowledge-base post could be found, and reaction so far is limited to X/Twitter engagement with no substantive independent technical critique yet surfaced.
